lessons.title: Encryption for Network Security
lessons.description: Symmetric vs asymmetric encryption, TLS/SSL, IPsec fundamentals – the building blocks of secure tunnels.

lessons.title: VPN Fundamentals and Types
lessons.description: Remote Access vs Site-to-Site VPNs, SSL VPN vs IPsec VPN, and use cases for each.

lessons.title: VPN Protocols Deep Dive
lessons.description: IPsec IKEv1/v2, SSL/TLS VPN, WireGuard, and legacy protocols – strengths and weaknesses.

lessons.title: Proxies: The Middlemen of the Internet
lessons.description: Forward, reverse, and transparent proxies – how they enhance security, privacy, and performance.

lessons.title: Zero Trust and Modern Secure Access
lessons.description: The shift from VPN perimeter to Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) and best practices.
